zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy於1405年2月22日出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾馬波爾時，他的父親Sir James Kennedy29歲，母親Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus11402歲。他於大約1424年與Lady Catherine Maxwell在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1489年3月27日在他的家鄉享年84歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾馬波爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy于1405年2月22日出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾馬波爾时，他的父亲Sir James Kennedy29岁，母亲Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus11402岁。他于大约1424年与Lady Catherine Maxwell在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1489年3月27日在他的家乡享年84岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰艾斯爾馬波爾。

nameMeanings.name: Kennedy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceannéidigh ‘descendant of Ceannéidigh’ (from ceann ‘head’ + éidigh ‘ugly’); or from the Scottish Gaelic Mac Cinnèidigh, consisting of mac ‘son’ with an equivalent name. Compare Canaday , Cannady , Cannedy , Kannady , and Kenedy .

History: Kennedy ancestral lands are found both in Ireland and in Scotland, where the family's medieval ancestral seat is sited on the Ayrshire coast, facing the Irish Sea. — The great-grandparents of President John Fitzgerald Kennedy (1917–63) came to North America as immigrants from Ireland in the 1840s. His paternal great-grandparents were Patrick Kennedy (1823–58), born in Dunganstown, County Wexford, Ireland, and Bridget Murphy, who was born probably in Owenduff, County Wexford, Ireland c. 1827; they came to Boston, MA, in 1849. His maternal great-grandparents were Thomas Fitzgerald (1823–85), who was born in Bruff, County Limerick, Ireland, and Rose Anna Cox, who was born probably in Tomregan or Kinawley, County Cavan, Ireland, c. 1835; they came to Boston, MA, in 1857. — An early Scottish Kennedy forebear of a quite different family was British colonial official Archibald Kennedy (1685–1763), the son of Alexander Kennedy of Craigoch, who emigrated to NY c. 1710.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy was born on 22 February 1405, in Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir James Kennedy, was 29 and his mother, Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus, was 11402. He married Lady Catherine Maxwell about 1424, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 27 March 1489, in his hometown, at the age of 84, and was buried in Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy est né le 22 février 1405, à Maybole, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir James Kennedy, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus, avait 11402 ans. Il a épousé Lady Catherine Maxwell environ 1424, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 27 mars 1489, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterré à Maybole, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy am 22. Februar 1405 in Maybole, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir James Kennedy 29 und seine Mutter Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus 11402. Er hat um 1424 in Schottland, United Kingdom Lady Catherine Maxwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 27. März 1489 im Alter von 84 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Maybole, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy è nato il il 22 febbraio 1405 nel Maybole, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir James Kennedy, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus, aveva 11402 anni. Lui sposato Lady Catherine Maxwell circa 1424, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 27 marzo 1489, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolto a Maybole, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedyが1405年2月22日にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアメイボルで生まれた時，父Sir James Kennedyは29歳，母Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angusは11402歳であった。約1424年にイギリススコットランドでLady Catherine Maxwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1489年3月27日に故郷で84歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアメイボルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy(이)가 1405년 2월 22일 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 메이볼일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir James Kennedy(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus(은)는 11402세였다. 그는 대략 1424년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Lady Catherine Maxwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1489년 3월 27일 그의 고향에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 메이볼일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy nasceu em 22 de fevereiro de 1405, em Maybole, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir James Kennedy, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus, tinha 11402 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Catherine Maxwell aproximadamente 1424, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de março de 1489, em sua cidade natal, com 84 anos, e foi sepultado em Maybole, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy родился 22 февраля 1405 г. в местности меибол, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir James Kennedy было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus, 11402. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Catherine Maxwell около 1424 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 27 марта 1489 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 84 лет и был похоронен в местности меибол, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy nació el 22 de febrero de 1405, en Maybole, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir James Kennedy, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus, tenía 11402 años. Se casó con Lady Catherine Maxwell aproximadamente 1424, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 27 de marzo de 1489, en su pueblo, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultado en Maybole, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
